description: Yao, S., Zhao, J., Yu, D., Du, N., Shafran, I., Narasimhan, K., & Cao, Y. (2022). ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models. arXiv:2210.03629. Multi-turn loop where each turn is a full reason→act→observe cycle.

Huang, W., et al. (2022). Inner Monologue: Embodied Reasoning through Planning with Language Models. arXiv:2207.05608. LLM uses accumulated conversation history as implicit state tracker across turns.
